fill-pdf-form-with-data-table-exception-.title: Fill PDF Form with DataTable and Handle Exceptions
fill-pdf-form-with-data-table-exception-.description: The example shows how to use Aspose.Pdf.Facades.AutoFiller to bind a PDF template, import data from a DataTable, and save the filled document while handling common PDF and file related exceptions.

convert-filled-pdf-to-byte-array.title: Convert Filled PDF to Byte Array Using PdfViewer
convert-filled-pdf-to-byte-array.description: Shows how to load a filled PDF with Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfViewer and return its content as a byte array directly from memory, avoiding any disk writes.

fill-pdf-form-async-timeout.title: Fill PDF Form Asynchronously with Timeout Cancellation
fill-pdf-form-async-timeout.description: Demonstrates how to fill a PDF form using Aspose.Pdf.Facades, then save the document asynchronously while aborting the operation if it exceeds a specified timeout via a CancellationToken.

batch-fill-pdf-template-with-multiple-da.title: Batch Fill PDF Template with Multiple DataTables
batch-fill-pdf-template-with-multiple-da.description: Shows how to repeatedly fill a single PDF form template using a list of DataTable objects, producing a separate filled PDF for each data set.

map-datatable-columns-to-pdf-form-fields.title: Map DataTable Columns to PDF Form Fields with AutoFiller
map-datatable-columns-to-pdf-form-fields.description: Shows how to rename DataTable columns to match PDF form field identifiers and use Aspose.Pdf.Facades.AutoFiller to automatically fill the PDF form.

fill-pdf-form-per-datarow-merge-pages.title: Fill PDF Form per DataTable Row and Merge Pages with Logging
fill-pdf-form-per-datarow-merge-pages.description: Demonstrates how to fill a PDF form for each DataTable row using AutoFiller, merge the generated pages into a single document, and log the processed row and page numbers.

generate-pdfs-from-multiple-csv-workshee.title: Generate PDFs from Multiple CSV Worksheets using AutoFiller
generate-pdfs-from-multiple-csv-workshee.description: The example reads each CSV file in a folder, converts it to a DataTable, and uses Aspose.Pdf.Facades.AutoFiller to populate a PDF form template, producing a separate PDF for each worksheet.

configure-datacolumn-properties-fill-pdf.title: Configure DataColumn Properties and Fill PDF Form with AutoFiller
configure-datacolumn-properties-fill-pdf.description: The example shows how to set DataColumn flags such as ReadOnly and Unique before importing a DataTable into a PDF form using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.AutoFiller, and how to create a simple PDF template with form fields.

merge-filled-pdfs-from-datatables.title: Merge Multiple Filled PDFs Generated from DataTables
merge-filled-pdfs-from-datatables.description: The example fills a PDF form template with data from several DataTables, saves each filled document, and then concatenates all PDFs into a single consolidated file.

stream-large-csv-fill-pdf-form.title: Stream Large CSV Data into PDF Form Using AutoFiller
stream-large-csv-fill-pdf-form.description: Demonstrates how to read a large CSV file row‑by‑row into a DataTable and use Aspose.Pdf.Facades.AutoFiller to merge the data into a PDF form without exhausting memory.

bind-pdf-form-to-autofiller.title: Bind PDF Form to AutoFiller and Save
bind-pdf-form-to-autofiller.description: Demonstrates how to bind an existing PDF form to an Aspose.Pdf.Facades.AutoFiller instance and save the (potentially unchanged) document to a new file.

fill-pdf-form-with-autofiller.title: Fill PDF Form Using AutoFiller and DataTable
fill-pdf-form-with-autofiller.description: Shows how to bind a PDF template, import data from a DataTable (simulating an XLSX source), and generate a filled PDF using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.AutoFiller.

save-filled-pdf-preserve-layout.title: Save Filled PDF While Preserving Layout
save-filled-pdf-preserve-layout.description: Shows how to bind a filled PDF using the Form facade and save it to a new file, keeping the original layout unchanged.

fill-pdf-form-with-autofiller__v2.title: Fill PDF Form Using AutoFiller and Dispose Resources
fill-pdf-form-with-autofiller__v2.description: Demonstrates how to populate a PDF form from a DataTable using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.AutoFiller and automatically release unmanaged resources with a using block.

generate-pdf-per-datarow.title: Generate One‑Page PDFs from DataTable Rows
generate-pdf-per-datarow.description: Demonstrates loading a PDF form template, filling its fields with values from each DataTable row, saving each filled document as a separate one‑page PDF, and verifying the page count.

extract-pdf-pages-with-custom-names.title: Extract PDF Pages with Custom File Names from DataTable
extract-pdf-pages-with-custom-names.description: Shows how to split a PDF into individual pages using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfFileEditor and name each generated PDF file according to values stored in a DataTable.

validate-required-pdf-form-fields.title: Validate Required PDF Form Fields Against DataTable Columns
validate-required-pdf-form-fields.description: Shows how to check that every required AcroForm field in a PDF has a matching column in a DataTable before filling the form, and then fills the fields if validation passes.

fill-pdf-form-with-datatable-custom-colu.title: Fill PDF Form Using DataTable with Custom Columns
fill-pdf-form-with-datatable-custom-colu.description: Shows how to create a PDF form, add matching DataTable columns (including extra custom columns) via DataColumnCollection, populate rows, and import the data into the form using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.AutoFiller.

password-protect-filled-pdf.title: Password‑Protect a Filled PDF with Aspose.Pdf
password-protect-filled-pdf.description: Demonstrates loading an already filled PDF and applying user and owner passwords with specific privileges using the PdfFileSecurity facade.

fill-pdf-form-using-autofiller-datatable.title: Fill PDF Form Using AutoFiller and DataTable
fill-pdf-form-using-autofiller-datatable.description: Demonstrates how to bind a PDF template, import a DataTable whose column names match AcroForm fields, and save the filled PDF using Aspose.Pdf's AutoFiller.

async-fill-pdf-form-from-xlsx.title: Asynchronously Fill PDF Form from XLSX Data
async-fill-pdf-form-from-xlsx.description: The example reads an XLSX file asynchronously, extracts field values, fills a PDF form using Aspose.Pdf's Form facade, and saves the filled PDF asynchronously.

fill-pdf-form-validate-size.title: Fill PDF Form and Validate Generated File Size
fill-pdf-form-validate-size.description: Demonstrates using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.AutoFiller to merge a DataTable into a PDF form, save the result, and verify that the output file does not exceed a predefined size limit.

fill-pdf-form-with-csv-dynamic-mapping.title: Fill PDF Form Using CSV Data with Dynamic Column Mapping
fill-pdf-form-with-csv-dynamic-mapping.description: Demonstrates loading CSV data into a DataTable, applying a JSON‑based column‑to‑PDF‑field mapping, and using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.AutoFiller to populate a PDF form.

process-pdf-with-temp-folder.title: Process PDF with Temporary Folder and Disk Buffer
process-pdf-with-temp-folder.description: Demonstrates how to use a unique temporary folder and disk buffering while processing large PDFs with Aspose.Pdf, including flattening, saving with intermediate files, and splitting into single‑page PDFs.

add-current-date-header-to-pdf.title: Add Current Date Header to PDF Using AutoFiller
add-current-date-header-to-pdf.description: Shows how to generate a PDF from a template with AutoFiller and then add a header containing the current date on every page using PdfFileStamp.

fill-pdf-form-from-csv.title: Fill PDF Form from CSV Data
fill-pdf-form-from-csv.description: Shows how to read a CSV file into a DataTable, map column names to PDF form field names, and use Aspose.Pdf.Facades.Form to fill and save the PDF.

generate-pdf-page-summary-report.title: Generate PDF Page‑to‑DataTable Summary Report
generate-pdf-page-summary-report.description: Creates a PDF (or a blank one if missing), populates a DataTable with identifiers for each page, and writes a text report mapping page numbers to the corresponding DataTable row IDs using Aspose.Pdf and its Facade class.

split-filled-pdf-into-single-page-pdfs.title: Split Filled PDF into Single-Page PDFs
split-filled-pdf-into-single-page-pdfs.description: Demonstrates loading a filled PDF and using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfFileEditor to split it into individual one‑page PDF files, naming each file with a page‑number placeholder.
